summary: Backend API testing for iteration 2 completed successfully. All 22 tests passed covering new integration endpoints (Razorpay payments, Resend email, Google OAuth, Priority Waitlist) plus regression tests on existing flows.
critical_code_review_comments: New integration endpoints handle missing API keys gracefully (503 for Razorpay, logging for Resend)
Google OAuth endpoint correctly validates session_id and returns 401 for invalid sessions
Waitlist endpoint correctly validates application status (only Pending allowed)
Payment signature verification uses HMAC SHA256 correctly
Email send is fire-and-forget (asyncio.create_task) - won't block approval flow
All existing flows (admin login, application workflow, room allocation, complaints, CSV exports, dashboard) still work correctly

test_credentials.student: Created dynamically via application approval - credentials returned in approve response

seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_IT2_ prefix for all created data. 8 demo rooms seeded on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added 4 new integrations: (1) Razorpay payments - /api/payments/config, /api/payments/fees/create-order, /api/payments/fees/verify, (2) Resend email - fires on application approval (logs when API key not set), (3) Google OAuth - /api/auth/google/session, (4) Priority Waitlist - /api/waitlist/create-order, /api/waitlist/verify. All endpoints tested and working. RAZORPAY_KEY_ID, RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY are intentionally empty - endpoints return 503 or log disabled gracefully.

mocked_integrations_verified.razorpay: Returns 503 when RAZORPAY_KEY_ID not configured - graceful degradation
mocked_integrations_verified.resend_email: Logs [EMAIL DISABLED] when RESEND_API_KEY not set - non-blocking
mocked_integrations_verified.emergent_google_oauth: Returns 401 for invalid session_id - real endpoint called
